violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Edges of the countertop under the oven are bare wood.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The freezer portion of the refrigerator in the back storage room needs to be cleaned.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Employees were washing dishes in the hand sink.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of single use items stored on the floor in the back storage room.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Plastic silverware was being dispensed with the food contact surface toward the customer in the breakfast area.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Hand sink was full of soapy water and dishes at the time of inspection.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towel dispenser was out of paper towels.
